category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an open-source port of Prince of Persia; official GitHub README says SDLPoP is an open-source port/conversion of the DOS game Prince of Persia.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sdlpop; official GitHub README heading is SDLPoP.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides general project information, links, build/use notes, and configuration information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/NagyD/SDLPoP, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Prince of Persia port; official GitHub README says it is based on the DOS version disassembly and extended with new features.
